description.default: HR moderation workspace for HB Kudos. Production permissions resolve solely from Entra ID security group membership in HB Kudos Admins and HB Kudos Reviewers — the webpart denies governance access when the current user is not a member. Cross-site list access targets a hardcoded canonical list host (HBCentral) — no editor configuration required. Includes governance actions, scheduling, prominence, claim/reassign, role-aware detail panel with audit timeline, bulk approve, and configurable overdue thresholds (pendingOverdueDays, adminReviewOverdueDays). Notification intents are session-queued; delivery channels (email/Teams) are not yet integrated.
